nodes.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Vision Life-Size Bust!  A threat has emerged from the cosmos. Thanos, a ruthless warlord plans to collect all of the Infinity Stones. Joined by his formidable allies, he will be near-unstoppable at achieving his goal. Vision, along with the Avengers, the Guardians of the Galaxy, Doctor Strange, and Spider-Man must join forces and fight side by side to stop Thanos, while the fate of the Earth and the Universe lies in the balance.   The 1:1 scale Vision Bust has blue, cog-like eyes facing forward, ready to take on Thanos. His pose reflects his cold, calculating, and emotionless persona. The bust features a movie-accurate cape and light-up Infinity Stone for a dynamic display.  To make the Vision bust life-like, Queen Studios' design team accoutned for every detail. Through trial and error, they have recreated a movie-accurate crimson finish with straight-lined detailing to make it look like he was created by machine and not man. The crimson body panels create contrast against Vision's teal suit with dulled silver edges. The base is black with golden accents and has been kept minimal to represent the simple yet logical nature of the character.  Don't miss your chance to add the Vision Life-Size Bust to your Avengers collection.
nodes.name: Vision

nodes.description: Sideshow and Queen Studios are proud to present the Iron Man Mark 7 Life-Size Bust!  Queen Studios have recreated the Mark 7 armor in a static pose while displaying the wind breakers fully engaged for a dynamic look. The suit boasts race-car red, and gold – along with a stand-out silver panel. This armor's ridged design is more distinguishable from later models.   Queen Studios' Mark 7 includes LEDs in both the suit's reactor and eyes, bringing the character to life. The chest plate finishes under the arc reactor, revealing the silver, mechanical insides. On the back, the wind breakers are engaged and arms lifted, displaying intricate details that make the Mark 7 so iconic. The base of the Mark 7 follows a similar design to other Iron Man busts by Queen Studios.   Don't miss your chance to add the Iron Man Mark 7 Bust to your armory!
nodes.name: Iron Man Mark 7

nodes.description: The thrilling Faces of Gotham™ Silver Coin Collection expands with its fifth release. This 1oz pure silver coin features GOTHAM CITY's criminal mastermind, TWO-FACE™.   Immortalized on a unique colored and shaped silver coin, this riveting design marks the contrast between the two sides of TWO-FACE.  The coin is placed inside a compact, themed box with a window for easy display. Further enhancing its appeal, is a unique serial number on the box to confirm its authenticity. And with only 5,000 being produced, this is a highly desirable collectible for any fan.  Take a chance on this one!
nodes.name: Two-Face 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: SHINRA TENSEI!   For our first Naruto Shippuden statue, we decided to portray the leader of the Akatsuki and Six Paths of Pain, Pain (Tendo). This overpowered antagonist is captured floating above Konahagakure and extending both hands out ready to use his ninjutsu attack, Shinra Tensei (All Mighty Push). For Pain's base, we decided to have the iconic Akatsuki cloud symbol present behind him in a minimalist design. Pain hovers while looking forward with his Rinnegan as he looks to usher in his dream of world peace through pain to the violent shinobi world.  This wall statue is created in 1/8th scale and will be made entirely of PVC. This statue will include two key hole hangers built into the black base with screws included and detailed instructions on how to safely anchor onto the wall.
nodes.name: Pain (Tendo)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx are excited to present the Warm Thoughts (Curse Edition) Polystone Statue!  A gentle geisha toy with the pool of her mind in this incredible piece. Her tender demeanor is juxtaposed with the harsh skull that she sits on. Warm thoughts of anger and rage fuel her mind, blackening the skull and turning the insides of her mind red with rancor.   Hell hath no fury as a woman scorned. What vengeful thoughts reside in her mind? Do you dare to take a dip and find out the horrors that await the target of these thoughts?  Don't miss your chance to add this beautiful polystone statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Warm Thoughts (Curse Edition)

nodes.description: The impeccably trained Grand Sorcerer Popp from DRAGON QUEST THE ADVENTURE OF DAI is joining the ARTFX J series!  His brave and courageous gaze along with the Medroa spell he has unleashed create a supremely stylish finish. The base contains the largest LED ever used by Kotobukiya, which brilliantly illuminates Popp's heroic form and Medroa.  By swapping out the left leg part, the figure can be displayed without any effects. The weird belt Popp received from Matoriv is also faithfully recreated. Popp, the most powerful sorcerer in history, worthy of his ultimate title, has been created!
nodes.name: Popp

nodes.description: Sideshow and Advanced Graphics are excited to present the new Mighty Thor Life-Size Standee!  This life-size standup of Thor from Marvel's Thor Love and Thunder stands at 70' tall and comes with an attached easel and folds down for shipping and storage.   Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Mighty Thor Life-Size Standee

nodes.description: 'I'm learning to live with a lot of things.'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the Darkman Variant Fine Art Lithograph by James Bousema!  This 24 x 36 unframed lithograph print is hand-numbered on 300gsm archival paper. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for fans of Darkman!
nodes.name: Darkman Variant

nodes.description: 'Oh, God! Don't! I've told you everything!'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the Darkman Fine Art Lithograph by James Bousema!  This 24 x 36 unframed lithograph print is hand-numbered on 300gsm archival paper. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for fans of Darkman!
nodes.name: Darkman

nodes.description: Sideshow and Advanced Graphics are excited to present the new Thor Life-Size Standee!  This life-size standup of Thor from Marvel's Thor Love and Thunder stands at 74' tall and comes with an attached easel and folds down for shipping and storage.   Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Thor Life-Size Standee

nodes.description: Her fashion sense is out of this world! The limited edition Ghost-Spider Designer Collectible Statue by Tracy Tubera saves the day with her slick kicks and sick kick drum beats.  About the Artist: Tracy Tubera AKA the ÜBER ILLUSTRATOR SUPREME has a style that is a mix of graffiti, anime, and comic book art. His artwork has an acute attention to sharp, crisp line work with splashes of bright pop colors. He mixes pop culture imagery with his love for sneakers, Super Heroes, and humor to create imagery all his own.  Artist Statement:  GWEN AKA GHOST-SPIDER  I have always loved the design and colors of SNEAKERS. The bright colors and intricate designs are the same reasons why I love COMIC BOOKS/SUPER HEROES. Also, there is always the story behind a certain Super Hero. Their SECRET ORIGIN. The amazing story of how a character got his/her powers. Or the incredible circumstances that caused a character to become a Super Hero. Most sneakers also have their own Secret Origin . The process that it took a designer to get to the final look of a sneaker. What inspired the look of a shoe. What influenced the use of certain materials or colors. So many things in common that I always felt needed to be explored.  These vinyl figures are what I call S.H.S. aka Super Heroes in Sneakers- two things that meant a lot to me growing up and still do to this day. Two completely different cultures mashed together to create a new visual of things most people wouldn't normally see together. I always wondered what kicks my favorite Super Hero would wear. That's why I would create these illustrations and now DESIGNER COLLECTIBLES!  At the EDGE OF THE SPIDER-VERSE, on Earth-65, there is no SPIDER-MAN. Instead there is only a young, brave, free-spirited GWEN STACY AKA GHOST-SPIDER. I was super excited to design this Art figure not only because I love this interpretation of GWEN ,but because now MILES can be paired up with his MULTIVERSAL crime fighting SPIDER PAL! Much like all my pieces, I l
nodes.name: Ghost-Spider

nodes.description: A fit so good, we might just have to clone his look! This limited edition Scarlet Spider Designer Collectible Statue by Tracy Tubera is as red as the Big Apple itself with shiny sneakers to match.  About the Artist: Tracy Tubera AKA the ÜBER ILLUSTRATOR SUPREME has a style that is a mix of graffiti, anime, and comic book art. His artwork has an acute attention to sharp, crisp line work with splashes of bright pop colors. He mixes pop culture imagery with his love for sneakers, Super Heroes, and humor to create imagery all his own.  Artist Statement:  BEN AKA SCARLET SPIDER  I have always loved the design and colors of SNEAKERS. The bright colors and intricate designs are the same reasons why I love COMIC BOOKS/SUPER HEROES. Also, there is always the story behind a certain Super Hero. Their SECRET ORIGIN. The amazing story of how a character got his/her powers. Or the incredible circumstances that caused a character to become a Super Hero. Most sneakers also have their own Secret Origin . The process that it took a designer to get to the final look of a sneaker. What inspired the look of a shoe. What influenced the use of certain materials or colors. So many things in common that I always felt needed to be explored.  These vinyl figures are what I call S.H.S. aka Super Heroes in Sneakers- two things that meant a lot to me growing up and still do to this day. Two completely different cultures mashed together to create a new visual of things most people wouldn't normally see together. I always wondered what kicks my favorite Super Hero would wear. That's why I would create these illustrations and now DESIGNER COLLECTIBLES!  BEN REILLY AKA SCARLET SPIDER is the perfect clone of PETER PARKER, but always wanted to be his own man. When the world needed a SPIDER-MAN, BEN didn't want to take on the name and look of the OG SPIDEY. He wanted to be his own HERO with his own STYLE. That's what I have always loved about this character. The SCARLET SPIDER's look was the EPIT
nodes.name: Scarlet Spider

nodes.description: Don't fret! Your favorite headbanging hero is here! Whether he's walking the runway or rocking the main stage, this limited edition Spider-Punk Designer Collectible Statue by Tracy Tubera is strutting — and strumming — in style.  About the Artist: Tracy Tubera AKA the ÜBER ILLUSTRATOR SUPREME has a style that is a mix of graffiti, anime, and comic book art. His artwork has an acute attention to sharp, crisp line work with splashes of bright pop colors. He mixes pop culture imagery with his love for sneakers, Super Heroes, and humor to create imagery all his own.  Artist Statement:  HOBART AKA SPIDER PUNK  I have always loved the design and colors of SNEAKERS. The bright colors and intricate designs are the same reasons why I love COMIC BOOKS/SUPER HEROES. Also, there is always the story behind a certain Super Hero. Their SECRET ORIGIN. The amazing story of how a character got his/her powers. Or the incredible circumstances that caused a character to become a Super Hero. Most sneakers also have their own Secret Origin . The process that it took a designer to get to the final look of a sneaker. What inspired the look of a shoe. What influenced the use of certain materials or colors. So many things in common that I always felt needed to be explored.  These vinyl figures are what I call S.H.S. aka Super Heroes in Sneakers- two things that meant a lot to me growing up and still do to this day. Two completely different cultures mashed together to create a new visual of things most people wouldn't normally see together. I always wondered what kicks my favorite Super Hero would wear. That's why I would create these illustrations and now DESIGNER COLLECTIBLES!  After being bitten by a spider irradiated by illegal waste dumping, a new SPIDER HERO arose on EARTH-138. On a world where the downtrodden people of New York needed a hero to lead them, HOBART BROWN AKA SPIDER PUNK stepped up with his new SPIDER POWERS and PUNK ROCK attitude. I wanted to design HOBIE
nodes.name: Spider-Punk

nodes.description: Come with me if you want to live.  Sideshow and Darkside Collectibles Studio is excited to present The Terminator T-800 Signature Premium 1/3 Scale Ultimate Edition Statue.   Following the 30th Anniversary Sarah Connor statue portrayed by Linda Hamilton and T-1000 portrayed by Robert Patrick the studio Is proud to present the final masterpiece of the Terminator 2 Judgement Day 30th Anniversary Character Series, the Terminator T-800.  Featuring the likeness of the actor Arnold Schwarzenegger, the ultimate edition captures the iconic scenes of the Galleria shoot-out, the Pescadero Hospital escape and the Cyberdyne Minigun police shoot-out. All major display options from the movie are included.   Galleria shoot-out features the Terminator stepping on the roses and holding the Winchester 1887 Shotgun.  Pescadero Hospital escape features the Terminator on a plain base holding the Winchester 1887 Shotgun.  Cyberdyne Shoot out Minigun Attack features the Terminator on a Plain or minigun bullet base, holding the Hand Held M134 Minigun, the minigun ammo bag strapped in one shoulder and the M79 grenade launcher on the other. The statue can be displayed with or without the fabric grenade launcher belt.   Cyberdyne Shoot out Grenade Launcher Attack features the Terminator on a Plain or minigun bullet base holding the M79 Grenade Launcher and can be displayed with or without the fabric grenade launcher belt.  Fully sculpted to the finest detail this masterpiece gives a super realistic look of the character. The detail of each part including the leather jacket is pure perfection. The weapons Winchester 1887, M79 grenade launcher, Hand Held M134 Minigun and Colt Series 70/Detonics 1911 Hybrid belt pistol are precisely reproduced with a high attention to every detail. In addition, the removable sunglasses complete the stunning presentation.    The statue is masterfully handcrafted and individually hand-painted to the highest quality standards. Featuring hyper-realistic clothing de
nodes.name: T-800 (Ultimate Edition)

nodes.description: Come with me if you want to live.  Sideshow and Darkside Collectibles Studio is excited to present The Terminator T-800 Signature Edition Premium 1/3 Scale Statue.   Following the 30th Anniversary Sarah Connor statue portrayed by Linda Hamilton and T-1000 portrayed by Robert Patrick the studio Is proud to present the final masterpiece of the Terminator 2 Judgment Day 30th Anniversary Character Series, the Terminator T-800.  Featuring the likeness of the actor Arnold Schwarzenegger, the statue captures the iconic scene of the famous Galleria shoot-out.  The statue is masterfully handcrafted and individually hand-painted to the highest quality standards. Featuring hyper-realistic clothing details and a stunning hyper real life-like skin likeness portrait of the actor Arnold Schwarzenegger the ultimate collector's satisfaction is guaranteed.   Fully sculpted to the finest detail this masterpiece gives a super realistic look of the character. The detail of each part including the leather jacket is pure perfection. The weapons Winchester 1887 in hand and Colt Series 70/Detonics 1911 Hybrid belt pistol are precisely reproduced with a high attention to the details. In addition, the removable sunglasses complete the stunning presentation.    A themed base featuring the gold box and the roses from the first shootout scene of the movie against T-1000 completes a screen accurate representation.   The Terminator T-800 is the final character Statue of the line of Terminator 2 Judgment Day series developed by Darkside Collectibles Studio, under license by Studio Canal and Oak Productions.  A printed Certificate of Authenticity licensed to carry the original signature of the Terminator Arnold Schwarzenegger, guarantees the authenticity of the work of art produced by Darkside Collectibles Studio under license from Studio Canal and Oak Productions.   This is a must-have piece for all Terminator fans!
nodes.name: T-800

nodes.description: Next in the Chibi® coin series features the beloved fashionista, Rachel Green™, from the iconic TV series, FRIENDS™  This wonderful piece displays Rachel wearing her iconic Central Perk waitress uniform and with a cup of coffee in her hand. Made from 1oz pure silver, the coin is shaped and colored to resemble the character as Chibi art. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it is legal tender.   Officially licensed in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a FRIENDS™ branded case and includes a large window, ideal for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed at the back of the box alongside the coin's unique serial number in the mintage of just 2,000.   This piece is sure to be popular, so make sure to grab yours today!
nodes.name: Rachel Green 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: The first release in our FRIENDS™ Chibi® Coin Collection features our favorite paleontologist, Ross Geller™, from the hit TV series. Naturally, there will be more FRIENDS to come!  Officially licensed in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, this gleaming piece is made from 1oz of pure silver and is shaped and colored to resemble Ross as Chibi art. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it is a legal tender coin.   Each coin comes safely stored in a FRIENDS™ branded case and includes a large window, making it perfect for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed at the back of the box alongside the coin's unique serial number in the mintage of just 2,000.   Grab yours today and relive the treasured memories of this 90's classic!
nodes.name: Ross Geller 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the Blood Angels Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel!  Joy Toy brings the Blood Angels from Warhammer 40k to life with this new series of 1/18 scale figures. Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel includes articulated hands and body and stands over 7' tall.  Warhammer 40k fans, be sure to add the Blood Angels Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel to your collection today!
nodes.name: Blood Angels Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel

nodes.description: Super-hero teams had been around since the 1940s, but Thor, Ant-Man, the Wasp, Hulk, and Iron Man broke new ground when they joined forces to form the Avengers in 1963. They not only fought together, they occasionally fought each other! The first 20 stories from the Avengers are collected in this Hulk-sized volume and have been meticulously photographed from the most pristine copies of these rare comic books—a fine art celebration worthy of Tony Stark's library.  Relive the classic early adventures of Avengers Nos. 1–20 in an XXL-sized edition that's bigger than the Hulk's fist, weightier than Thor's hammer, and with more extras than Iron Man's armor. TASCHEN has attempted to create an ideal representation of these books as they were produced at the time of publication. The most pristine pedigreed comics have been cracked open and photographed for reproduction in close collaboration with Marvel and the Certified Guaranty Company. Each page has been photographed as printed more than half a century ago, then digitally remastered using modern retouching techniques to correct problems with the era's inexpensive, imperfect printing—as if hot off of a world-class 1960s printing press.  Accompanying the stories are an original foreword by Marvel Studios President Kevin Feige and an in-depth history by the Eisner Award-winning writer Kurt Busiek that's illustrated with original art, little-seen photographs, and rare documents.   Marvel fans, be sure to add the Avengers. Vol. 1. 1963-1965 (Standard Edition) to your library today!
nodes.name: Marvel Comics Library. Avengers. Vol. 1. 1963-1965 (Standard Edition)

nodes.description: Super-hero teams had been around since the 1940s, but Thor, Ant-Man, the Wasp, Hulk, and Iron Man broke new ground when they joined forces to form the Avengers in 1963. They not only fought together, they occasionally fought each other! The first 20 stories from the Avengers are collected in this Hulk-sized volume and have been meticulously photographed from the most pristine copies of these rare comic books—a fine art celebration worthy of Tony Stark's library.  Relive the classic early adventures of Avengers Nos. 1–20 in an XXL-sized edition that's bigger than the Hulk's fist, weightier than Thor's hammer, and with more extras than Iron Man's armor. TASCHEN has attempted to create an ideal representation of these books as they were produced at the time of publication. The most pristine pedigreed comics have been cracked open and photographed for reproduction in close collaboration with Marvel and the Certified Guaranty Company. Each page has been photographed as printed more than half a century ago, then digitally remastered using modern retouching techniques to correct problems with the era's inexpensive, imperfect printing—as if hot off of a world-class 1960s printing press.  Accompanying the stories are an original foreword by Marvel Studios President Kevin Feige and an in-depth history by the Eisner Award-winning writer Kurt Busiek that's illustrated with original art, little-seen photographs, and rare documents.   This deluxe volume features an aluminum print cover tipped into a leatherette-bound spine, foil embossing, and is housed in a slipcase.  Marvel fans, be sure to add the Avengers. Vol. 1. 1963-1965 (Collector's Edition) to your library today!
nodes.name: Marvel Comics Library. Avengers. Vol. 1. 1963-1965 (Collector's Edition)

nodes.description: Who will survive and what will be left of them?   When you hear the chainsaw revving, you'd better start running! Sideshow Art Prints presents The Butcher: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Fine Art Print, an original horror art collectible by artist Jason Edmiston.  The classic slasher Leatherface is on the loose in this terrifying pastoral portrait. Artist Jason Edmiston's ideal realism style uses high contrast and saturated colors to create a scene that is less than ideal, depending on where you're standing. The cannibal butcher chases victims off the Sawyer family farm with his signature chainsaw in a recreation of the climactic final moments of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre film. Disguised in the Pretty Woman mask, his stitched visage instills immediate fear as some unfortunate souls are about to meat their maker.  Each The Butcher: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 400 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this horror artwork memorializes an iconic cinematic moment that fans won't want to miss. Pair this print with the articulated Leatherface Deluxe Sixth Scale Figure by Sideshow, sold separately, for a dynamic addition to any display.   See if you can survive the slaughter — bring home The Butcher: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Fine Art Print by Jason Edmiston today!
nodes.name: The Butcher

nodes.description: I know not who or what they are below! I only know Galactus must feed!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Galactus: The Devourer Fine Art Print, an explosive new Marvel art print by artist Doaly.  It's a colorful cosmic calamity in the mighty Marvel manner! Artist Doaly renders a vibrant take on the ceaseless hunger that is Galactus, the Devourer of Worlds. The Silver Surfer has summoned his master to a grouping of worlds to fuel his never-ending needs, as the planet in the center is broken apart in a shower of blinding brightness. Even the boundaries of the image border cannot contain Galactus' unstoppable energy, as the Power Cosmic radiates outward to form a full bleed giclée design that is bursting with detail and destruction.  Each Galactus: The Devourer Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Pair this Galactus wall art with the Galactus Maquette or Silver Surfer Maquette by Sideshow, each sold separately, for a Marvel Comics display packed with crackling cosmic power.  As his herald, direct him to a new world! Consume your collection with the presence of the Galactus: The Devourer Fine Art Print by Doaly today.
nodes.name: Galactus: The Devourer

nodes.description: This planet shall sustain me until it has been drained of all elemental life! So speaks Galactus!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Galactus: The Devourer Variant Fine Art Print, an explosive new Marvel art print by artist Doaly. This alternate color presentation uses cooler colors to give the galactic scene a stylish new appearance.  It's a colorful cosmic calamity in the mighty Marvel manner! Artist Doaly renders a chilling take on the ceaseless hunger that is Galactus, the Devourer of Worlds. The Silver Surfer has summoned his master to a grouping of worlds to fuel his never-ending needs, as the planet in the center is broken apart in a shower of blinding brightness. Even the boundaries of the image border cannot contain Galactus' unstoppable energy, as the Power Cosmic radiates outward to form a full bleed giclée design that is bursting with detail and destruction.  Each Galactus: The Devourer Variant Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Pair this Galactus wall art with the Galactus Maquette or Silver Surfer Maquette by Sideshow, each sold separately, for a Marvel Comics display packed with crackling cosmic power.  He hungers for a new world! Consume your collection with the presence of the Galactus: The Devourer Variant Fine Art Print by Doaly today.
nodes.name: Galactus: The Devourer Variant

nodes.description: My birth name is Harleen Quinzel, but my friends an' enemies know me simply as Harley Quinn!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Harley Quinn Fine Art Print, a DC Comics art print by artist Mingjue Helen Chen celebrating the iconic rogue's solo adventures.  Gotham's very own Maid of Mischief isn't always playing with a full deck, but she sure knows how to shuffle things up with her signature brand of colorful crime! Harley Quinn is surrounded by a cascade of cards featuring the faces of other powerful figures in the city, including Batman, Batgirl, and The Joker. With her hammer in hand, this Gotham gal is the ace in the hole ready to be unleashed on the cutthroat city of crime.  Originally created as a variant cover for DC Rebirth: Harley Quinn #1 (2016), written by Jimmy Palmiotti and Amanda Conner for DC Comics, this comic book collectible is available in a fine art format for fans. Each Harley Quinn Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Whether you have a secret lair full of Batman collectibles or are a fan of the Clown Princess of Crime on her own, don't miss out on this mischievous Harley Quinn wall art for your home gallery.  No need for the poker face — bring a little brightness to your Batman artwork collection with the Harley Quinn Fine Art Print by Mingjue Helen Chen today!
nodes.name: Harley Quinn

nodes.description: Sideshow and 3D Retro are excited to present the Lucy Red Edition Vinyl Collectible!  This figure stands 6' tall and is the first-ever Lucy Collectible. With only 666 of this version created, don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Lucy Red Edition

nodes.description: Sideshow and HEX Collectibles present the Senju Hashirama Ultimate Diorama Statue in 1:8 scale from Naruto Shippuden. The statue measures 22.7' tall, inspired by the battle between Senju Hashirama and Uchiha Madara. Hashirama makes wood golem and dragon to confront with Madara's Complete Body — Susano'o.  Hashirama wears the dark red armour constructed from numerous metal plates, and a huge scroll is tied behind his waist. The God of Shinobi wields his scarred samurai broadsword standing atop the body of wood dragon, roaring at Madara with an angry face. His long black hair swings with the wind, and crumbled stones fly in the air, which shows a dynamic battle scene perfectly.   The giant wood golem rises straight from the ground, clenching it left fist ready to punch the enemy. The wood dragon with a hook nose coils around the golem, snarling with a horrible look. They are detailed sculpted with stern eyes, sharp teeth, and wood-like grain, which adds a realistic feeling to the whole statue.   Just like the brand concept of HEX Collectibles, our team has always looked at ways to push the boundary on design and capture the essence of each character we love. HEX Collectibles will continue to bring beloved characters to life with the distinguished dynamic design style.  Naruto Shippuden fans, don't miss your chance to add this Hashirama statue to your UDS collection!
nodes.name: God of Shinobi - Senju Hashirama

nodes.description: 'I've only known one other being like this.....'  Ahsoka Tano™ proves to be a valuable friend and an ally as she shares her newly gleaned connection with The Child and reveals his name...Grogu™. While she declines the Mandalorian's™ multiple requests to train Grogu, she ultimately recommends the clan of 2 travel to Tython to visit the ancient seeing stone. Inspired by this fateful meeting, The Mandalorian™ - Connection Fine Art Print by Monte Moore and Thomas Kinkade Studios beautifully captures the creation of this new bond.   The Mandalorian™ Collection presented by the Thomas Kinkade Studios is a series of Limited Edition Art that captures iconic scenes from each chapter of the Disney+ Star Wars™ live-action series. Each work of art brings beloved characters and stories to life with the luminous techniques the artists of the Thomas Kinkade Studios are known for. This historic collection marks the first set of paintings published by Thomas Kinkade Studios to include the artist's signature.  A truly beautiful addition to any Star Wars art gallery, and a must-have for fans of The Mandalorian!
nodes.name: Connection

nodes.description: Sideshow and Tweeterhead present the newest addition from the Masters of the Universe - Hordak Legends (Special Edition) Maquette!   Hordak is a supervillain who opposes She-Ra and He-Man, as well as the franchise's main villain, Skeletor, to whom he was once a mentor. Standing at 21 inches tall, Hordak is sculpted to menacing perfection as the iconic supervillain.   Don't miss your chance to add the Hordak Legends Maquette to your Masters of the Universe collection.
nodes.name: Hordak Legends (Special Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Tweeterhead are proud to announce the newest addition to the DC Maquettes: Poison Ivy - Artist Proof Edition! This femme fatale stands at an impressive 14 inches tall atop a deadly venus flytrap throne complete with a Monster Plant by her side.  Alluring yet devious, Tweeterhead's Poison Ivy Maquette is a must-have for any fans of sultry supervillain Dr. Pamela Isley and DC Comics collectibles. Only available at Sideshow!
nodes.name: Poison Ivy (Artist Proof)

nodes.description: Sideshow and 3D Retro are thrilled to present the Vultura Macabra Arctic Melt Vinyl Collectible!  Standing 14″ tall, Camille Rose Garcia's vulture steps off her canvases and onto collector's shelves. Perched on a skull pile while seeking shelter under a parasol, the scavenger is a colorfully complex carnivore. Garcia's character comes to life with a strong sculpt, utilizing several sculpted layers of feathers rather than relying on paint alone.  About the Artist:  Drawing from an eclectic range of influences, Camille Rose Garcia makes visually engaging work with political messages. In her psychedelic, eye-popping paintings, detailed drawings, toys, and books she combines recognizable cartoon images and pop-cultural references. She strives for both visual pleasure and trenchant social criticism in her work.
nodes.name: Vultura Macabra Arctic Melt

nodes.description: This 96-page hardcover art book is the first in the Angelarium series containing art, poems, and short stories from the journeys of Enoch. Created by the celebrated fantasy painter Peter Mohrbacher with art and writing by Peter Mohrbacher and Eli Minaya, this unique collection will sweep you to another world.
nodes.name: Angelarium: Book of Emanations

nodes.description: This 112-page hardcover artbook is book 2 in the Angelarium series containing art, poems, and short stories from the journeys of Enoch. Created by the celebrated fantasy painter Peter Mohrbacher, this unique collection will sweep you to another world.
nodes.name: Angelarium: Book of Watchers

nodes.description: A Fish Out of Water  Adopted by Gwenpool during her time on the West Coast Avengers, Marvel's Jeffrey the Baby Land Shark was found living in a secret lair filled with land sharks. Unfortunately, when Gwenpool's comic was canceled, she brought Jeffrey to live with her friend Deadpool where the two became fast friends.   This 7.5-inch long Jeffrey the Baby Land Shark Qreature™ features a gray-blue body, which includes his fins, short little legs, and a grin full of sharp teeth. Like all of our Qreatures™, Jeffrey the Baby Land Shark is a sculptural, stylized plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape even when biting bad guys.   Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Jeffrey the Baby Land Shark Qreature

nodes.description: Sideshow and Star Ace are proud to present a deluxe collectible 1:6 articulated figure of the beloved Little Tramp, Charlie Chaplin!   This detailed representation of Chaplin's iconic character presents him as seen in multiple films from the early days of cinema, most notably in The Pawnshop.   This 1:6 scale figure features two swappable portraits of Chaplin, one with a smiling expression and another with an anxious expression. These heads have authentic likenesses and are individually hand-painted. His hat can fit on either head and a separate hair attachment is included so he can go hatless.  He comes with his traditional cane, valise and hat, and is outfitted in his tramp costume with waistcoat, topcoat, and baggy pants. The set also includes all the accessories needed for the classic alarm clock bit as seen in the film; the clock, hammer, screwdriver, stethoscope, metal cutters, and phone.  Don't miss your chance to add this one-of-a-kind collectible to your collection today!
nodes.name: Charlie Chaplin

nodes.description: To complement the 1:6 scale collectible figure of Charlie Chaplin, Star Ace is also releasing costume sets to recreate many iconic moments from his films.  This set is from 'The Adventure' – his prison uniform and the roller skates from Modern Times.   Don't miss your chance to add this accessory set to your collection today!
nodes.name: The Adventure

nodes.description: Sideshow and Star Ace are proud to present The Cabinet Accessories Set!  Recreate your favorite scenes from Charlie Chaplin's classic film, The Pawnshop with these accessory sets. This set includes the cabinets that hold all the random objects in the Pawn Shop.  Don't miss your chance to add this one-of-a-kind collectible set to your collection today!
nodes.name: The Pawn Shop Cabinet

nodes.description: To complement the 1:6 scale collectible figure of Charlie Chaplin, Star Ace is also releasing costume sets to recreate many iconic moments from his films.  This set is from the classic film Modern Times and comes with a set of worker's overalls, a t-shirt, and a set of wrenches.  Don't miss your chance to add this accessory set to your collection today!
nodes.name: Modern Times

nodes.description: No One Laughs at a Master of Quack-Fu!  Born on Duckworld, Marvel's Howard the Duck is from a planet where all intelligent life evolved from waterfowl. Duckworld resembles mankind's Earth in so many ways that when a power-hungry demon transported Howard to Florida, he thought he was still home. Well, until he saw all the hairless apes walking around.   This 11-inch tall Howard the Duck Qreature™ features his signature red three-piece suit and matching rumpled hat. Like all of our Qreatures™, Howard the Duck is a sculptural, stylized plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape even while confronting Doctor Angst and the Band of the Bland with his deadly Quack-Fu martial arts.  Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Howard the Duck Qreature

nodes.description: It's a cat, not Hannibal Lector!  A former pet of Mar-Vell, Goose of Marvel's Captain Marvel looks like an ordinary house cat. But he's not - he's a Flerken.  Flerkens can store entire universes in their mouths which they can open and unleash destruction and death upon their foes. Or someone who annoys them. Which could be anyone considering they are, after all, cats.  This 9-inch tall Goose Qreature™ features her orange tabby markings and cat collar with a name tag. Oh, and a mess of eldritch horror tentacles protruding from her mouth. Like all of our Qreatures™, Goose is a sculptural, stylized plush. She's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold her shape even while swallowing the Tesseract whole.   Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Goose the Flerken Qreature

nodes.description: Series 2 of The Mandalorian Geeki Tikis® have arrived!  This time around, you can choose to drink with fan-favorites Ahsoka Tano, Bo-Katan Kryze, or a Dark Trooper, all of whom made their live-action appearances in Season 2 of the Disney+ series The Mandalorian.   The Geeki Tikis® Star Wars Ahsoka Tano Mug holds 18 ounces of your favorite beverage and features a bright orange glazed finish with white accents. Depicted holding her dual sabers (she is a skilled duelist don't ya know!), Ahsoka Tano is ready for action!  This is the Way… to tropical refreshment, Star Wars style!
nodes.name: Ahsoka Tano

nodes.description: Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are proud to present the limited-edition Mandalorian Poster Coin Collection. Join the way of the Mandalore with New Zealand Mint's first release in the new silver Star Wars™ collectible Coin Series for the hit Lucasfilm series The Mandalorian™!  This one-of-a-kind Sideshow Exclusive coin features the legendary bounty hunter, Din Djarin™ (more popularly known as The Mandalorian™) displaying strength and resilience as he pushes his way forward despite the heavy baggage on his shoulders– including the adorable yet mischievous Grogu™!  The engraved phrase 'This is more than I signed up for' sits alongside the Mandalorian's Mudhorn signet – both perfectly complementing this colored image. The addition of an engraved masthead rounds off the coin design. In contrast, the obverse simply shows the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, to confirm it as a legal tender coin.   Only 2,000 will be made, don't miss your chance to own The Mandalorian 1oz Silver Coin.
nodes.name: The Mandalorian 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Series 2 of The Mandalorian Geeki Tikis® have arrived!  This time around, you can choose to drink with fan-favorites Ahsoka Tano, Bo-Katan Kryze or a Dark Trooper, all of whom made their live-action appearances in Season 2 of the Disney+ series The Mandalorian.   The Geeki Tikis® The Mandalorian Bo-Katan Kryze Mug holds 18 ounces of your favorite beverage and features a beautiful blue glazed finish with white accents. Now the leader of the Mandalorian resistance, Bo-Katan is depicted in her legendary Mandalorian armor and wielding her Westar-35 Blaster.  This is the Way… to tropical refreshment, Star Wars style!
nodes.name: Bo-Katan

nodes.description: Series 2 of The Mandalorian Geeki Tikis® have arrived!  This time around, you can choose to drink with fan-favorites Ahsoka Tano, Bo-Katan Kryze, or a Dark Trooper, all of whom made their live-action appearances in Season 2 of the Disney+ series The Mandalorian.   The Geeki Tikis® The Mandalorian Dark Trooper Mug holds 18 ounces of your favorite beverage and stands an impressive 7.5 tall. Undeniably the most menacing of our Stormtrooper Geeki Tikis® to date, the Dark Trooper features a glossy black glaze with glowing red eyes and a contrasting interior.   This is the Way… to tropical refreshment, Star Wars style!
nodes.name: Dark Trooper

nodes.description: Uniquely stylized collectible art, the Stephen Curry 2022 Golden State Warriors NBA Edition figure is a blend of urban street art and anime-influenced vinyl collectibles.  Only 500 figures were produced with the highest level of craftsmanship and attention to detail. The oversized, approximately 12-inch Stephen is an attractive, highly collectible, lifestyle product sure to make an immediate impression whether displayed in the home or at the office.The 2022 NBA Edition SmALL-STARS feature the new magnetic Wilson Official NBA Ball. The figure can be displayed with or without ball in hand!  Each limited edition unit is officially licensed by the NBA and individually numbered for collectors and fans alike! Be sure to add Stephen to your collection today!
nodes.name: Stephen Curry SmALL-STARS

nodes.description: Darth Vader is the scariest villain in the universe, but there is nothing scary about his toaster. The ultimate gift for Star Wars fans, our exclusive Darth Vader toaster is a lively kitchen companion. Simply insert the bread, press the lever, and you will hear Darth Vader's lightsaber turn on as the bottom of the toaster lights up in red. When the toast is done, you will know when you hear Vader's iconic breathing. Like toast on the dark side? Use the handy dial to adjust browning. Two wide slots accommodate bagels, English muffins, and thick breads. Shade selector dial from light to dark. Bagel and Cancel buttons. Removable crumb tray for easy cleaning. BPA-free.  This officially licensed toaster is sure to be an out-of-this-world gift for the Star Wars and Vader enthusiast in your life. So go ahead and join the Dark Side...we've got toast here!
nodes.name: Darth Vader Halo Toaster

nodes.description: Uniquely stylized collectible art, the Luka Doncic 2022 Mavericks NBA Edition figure is a blend of urban street art and anime-influenced vinyl collectibles.  Only 500 figures were produced with the highest level of craftsmanship and attention to detail. The oversized, approximately 12-inch Luka is an attractive, highly collectible, lifestyle product sure to make an immediate impression whether displayed in the home or at the office.  The 2022 NBA Edition SmALL-STARS feature the new magnetic Wilson Official NBA Ball. The figure can be displayed with or without ball in hand!  Each limited edition unit is officially licensed by the NBA and individually numbered for collectors and fans alike! Be sure to add Luka to your collection today!
nodes.name: Luka Doncic SmALL-STARS

nodes.description: At the time of their introduction, the Republic Clone Troopers™ represented the future of galactic warfare. Far superior to battle droids™, the Clone Troopers formed the backbone of the Republic's new military that waged war against the forces of the Confederacy of Independent Systems.  In celebrating the 20th anniversary of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones™, Sideshow and Hot Toys are delighted to introduce a series of Star Wars collectibles based on this film for fans!  The Clone Trooper Sixth Scale Collectible Figure features greatly detailed armor and helmet, two styles of blaster rifles, an interchangeable Phase 2 Clone Trooper helmet as seen in Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith™, an attachable backpack, a figure base, and specially designed commemorative packaging!  Grow your clone army now with this new Clone Trooper Collectible Figure!
nodes.name: Clone Trooper

nodes.description: A reliable and versatile astromech droid, R2-D2 has served Padmé Amidala and Anakin Skywalker, showing great bravery in rescuing his masters and their friends from many perils. A skilled starship mechanic and fighter pilot's assistant, he has an unlikely but enduring friendship with the fussy protocol droid C-3PO.  Celebrating the 20th anniversary of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones, Sideshow and Hot Toys is pleased to officially introduce a series of Star Wars collectibles based on this landmark film for fans!   The R2-D2 Sixth Scale Collectible Figure is skillfully crafted with a diecast metal dome, a highly detailed mechanical construction body with openable panels and a retractable middle leg, weathered paint application, an array of accessories including a pair of rocket thrusters, a tether cable for recreating the scene when R2-D2 fixes C-3PO, a collection of attachable mechanical arms and tools, as well as a specially designed commemorative packaging.  Don't miss the opportunity to pair R2-D2 with the C-3PO sixth scale figure in your Star Wars collection today!
nodes.name: R2-D2

nodes.description: During the Republic era, Clone Troopers™ were selected to be trained to become pilots to fly a variety of ships for the Clone army. In the battle of Geonosis™, they flew Republic Attack Gunships to support the Jedi™ in the fight with the Separatists.  To celebrate the 20th anniversary of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones™, Sideshow and Hot Toys are delighted to introduce a series of Star Wars collectibles based on this landmark film for fans!  The new Clone Pilot Sixth Scale Collectible Figure features a specialized Clone Pilot helmet, an interchangeable Clone Pilot helmet, a detailed armor with weathering effects, two styles of blasters, a pair of binoculars, thermal detonators, and a figure base!  Add another member of the clone army to your Star Wars collection today!
nodes.name: Clone Pilot

nodes.description: Rather than use flesh-and-blood warriors, the Separatists prefer mindlessly loyal soldiers that are easily controlled. The soulless ranks of their armies are dominated by tall, thin B1 battle droids built as mechanical imitations of their Geonosian™ designers.  Celebrating the 20th anniversary of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones™, Sideshow and Hot Toys are excited to present a series of Star Wars collectibles based on this landmark film for fans!  The new Battle Droid (Geonosis) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure is inspired by the battle droid's appearance in the Geonosis™ arena battle. It features a newly developed mechanical structure with exceptional articulations, a blaster rifle, a pair of binoculars, a sand-themed figure base, an interchangeable C-3PO™ head recreating the comical scenes when the droids were misconfigured, and a specially designed commemorative packaging!  It is now a great time to add battle droids into your Star Wars™ collection!
nodes.name: Battle Droid (Geonosis)

nodes.description: Programmed for etiquette and protocol, Threepio was built by a young Anakin Skywalker, and has been a constant companion to astromech droid R2-D2. In Attack of the Clones, C-3PO left with Anakin and R2-D2 for Geonosis, where he had a bit of a misadventure - accidentally swapping heads with a battle droid. C-3PO found he was quite beside himself literally on the wrong side of the first battle of the Clone Wars.  In celebrating the 20th anniversary of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones, Sideshow and Hot Toys is excited to officially present a series of Star Wars collectibles based on this landmark film for fans!   The all-new C-3PO Sixth Scale Collectible Figure is skillfully crafted in diecast material featuring detailed mechanical design with amazing weathering effects, LED light-up eyes, a blaster, an interchangeable Battle Droid head, a figure base, and a special designed commemorative packaging!  This human-cyborg relations protocol droid will be an excellent addition to your Star Wars collection alongside the R2-D2 sixth scale figure!
nodes.name: C-3PO

nodes.description: 'Goku isn't the only Super Saiyan! There's another one right here!'  The second Super Saiyan from 'Dragon Ball Z,' Super Saiyan Trunks, joins the FiguartsZERO EXTRA BATTLE series! This fixed-pose figure captures the climactic moment of Trunks' battle with Mecha Frieza, complete with both slashing effect and Mecha Frieza's severed body rendered in three dimensions!
nodes.name: (Extra Battle) Super Saiyan Trunks

nodes.description: Search your feelings — you know this to be cool! Urban Aztec goes galactic in the Darth Vader Designer Vinyl Collectible Bust by artist Jesse Hernandez, blending imperial aesthetics to unleash a Force like never before. With a light-up feature in the red saber blade, you can balance out the darkness in his heart wherever Vader is displayed.  About the Artist:Jesse Hernandez (@UrbanAztec) is a visual artist born and raised in the San Francisco Bay area, most widely recognized for his street art murals, vinyl toys, and diverse Illustration work. His style is known as Urban Aztec, a combination of graffiti and ancient indigenous culture. Hernandez's artwork has been featured by Warner Bros., the San Jose Sharks, the Oakland Museum, Rockstar energy drink, Rolling Stone magazine, Fandango, Juxtapoz, Gears of War 4, X-Box, Playstation, Run the Jewels, Oakland Athletics, and the Cosmopolitan Las Vegas. Hernandez has shown art in galleries and museums around the world. He has also painted murals in Oakland, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Mexico City and Amsterdam.
nodes.name: Darth Vader

nodes.description: I can bring you in warm, or I can bring you in cold.   Sideshow presents The Mandalorian™ – Din Djarin™ Life-Size Bust, an epic 1:1 Star Wars™ collectible for fans of The Mandalorian™. Created in partnership with Legacy Effects, this intimidating bust captures the stoic presence of the fan-favorite bounty hunter like never before.  The Mandalorian – Din Djarin Life-Size Bust measures 33.5 tall and 27 wide as he remains vigilant searching for his next target. With rotational articulation in the helmet, collectors can directionally change his focus for added storytelling in any display. His sleek silver armor and costume elements are fully sculpted, recreating his now-iconic silhouette in fiberglass design. Din Djarin's chest armor, helmet, bandolier, and even cape bear details of weathering and distress accumulated in his dangerous travels. Finally, his right shoulder pauldron features the unique mudhorn™ signet bestowed upon him by the Armorer™. For those who walk the Way of the Mandalore™, this is a must-have centerpiece in any galactic display.  Bring home the bounty and add The Mandalorian – Din Djarin Life-Size Bust to your Star Wars collection today.
nodes.name: The Mandalorian - Din Djarin

nodes.description: First 4 Figures is proud to present their latest resin collectible, Nameless King. This is the first statue to release in their Dark Souls™ III lineup.   'The Nameless King was once a dragon-slaying god of war, before he sacrificed everything to ally himself with the ancient dragons.'—Soul of the Nameless King, Dark Souls™ III   The statue is inspired by the iconic cutscene in the game where the King of the Storm uses his Dragonslayer Swordspear to slay his Stormdrake mount and absorb its remaining life force to become the Nameless King. This occurs just before the second phase of the boss battle.   The statue's storm-like presence is further enhanced through the impeccable sculptural details and overall color palette. And the base is designed to represent the ruins and pathways of Archdragon Peak, which is where the Nameless King can be summoned by ringing the bell at the Great Belfry.   Dark Souls fans out there, don't miss your chance to add the Nameless King to your collection today!
nodes.name: Nameless King (Standard Edition)

nodes.description: The Iron Spider from 'Spider Man: No Way Home' rejoins S.H.Figuarts with new colors! Designed to even more closely resemble his on-screen appearance, it comes with web effects to let you re-create your favorite scenes.   Add to your Marvel collection!
nodes.name: Iron Spider

nodes.description: He's a lawman with the panache of a showman. Hotwing has the sleight-of-hand and mystical abilities to misdirect the bad guys straight into custody!  This 7 scale highly-articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Hotwing features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories fit for this flashy crimefighter. Despite his skill as a magician, this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure isn't going to just magically appear in your collection, so order yours before the chance to get him disappears in a puff of smoke!
nodes.name: Hotwing

nodes.description: Bela Lugosi starred in the 1932 movie White Zombie, the first movie made about the walking undead. He plays Murder Legendre an evil voodoo master who compels innocents to do his bidding. He controls others by drugging them and using a wax doll to force their obedience.   Star Ace and Sideshow are proud to present the Murder Legendre (Black & White Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure in celebration for the 90th anniversary of the film. It features an authentic likeness of Bela Lugosi. His faithful costume features a black cloak and hat and he comes with a wax doll of his victim.  With an edition size of 200 pieces, this item also includes a 1:1 scale ring for this Black and White version only.
nodes.name: Murder Legendre (Black & White Version)

nodes.description: Monster X, from 'Godzilla: FINAL WARS,' joins S.H.MonsterArts! Featuring sharp, edgy sculpting and a whip-like twin tail, it perfectly captures the kaiju's terrifying on-screen appearance. Overseen by sculptor Mitsuhiko Hosokawa, who designed S.H.MonsterArts' distinctive jointing systems, it is fully posable without compromising the look or feel of the character. It even includes a pair of grappling hands for re-creating the climactic match against Godzilla.
nodes.name: Monster X

nodes.description: With his ability to change shape and size to disguise himself as anyone or anything, Mo-Lec-U-Lar is one of the most dangerous criminals in the Limbo Galaxy!  This 7 scale highly articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Mo-Lec-U-Lar features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories including the transformation ring he uses to alter his form. One of the few things that can give away his disguised form is his shadow, so it might be safest to have this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure in the spotlight of your collection, literally!
nodes.name: Mo-Lec-U-Lar

nodes.description: Mumbo Jumbo is the Strongman, or in his case, bull of the Mob. This one-man-bull security detail is more than ready, willing, and able to muscle through any heist as cool as a cucumber, or if his forehead jewel turns red as angry as a steer and as large as a wrecking ball!  This 7 scale highly articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Mumbo Jumbo features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories suitable for this beefy part-bovine criminal. Given his penchant for charging around like a bull in a china shop, once you get this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure, choose wisely on where to display him.
nodes.name: Mumbo Jumbo

nodes.description: He's been fighting crime in the Limbo Galaxy for over 300 years and there's no way Commander Stargazer is going to sit back and let Mon*Star and his cronies run amok on his watch!  This 7 scale highly-articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Commander Stargazer features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories suitable for a no-nonsense galactic lawman. This dedicated crime fighter is the force that keeps the SilverHawks on-task and hot on the heels of galactic criminals, and adding this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure can keep your collection at its best.
nodes.name: Commander Stargazer

nodes.description: Uniquely stylized collectible art, the LeBron James 2022 Lakers NBA Edition figure is a blend of urban street art and anime-influenced vinyl collectibles.  Only 500 figures were produced with the highest level of craftsmanship and attention to detail. The oversized, approximately 12-inch LeBron is an attractive, highly collectible, lifestyle product sure to make an immediate impression whether displayed in the home or at the office.  The 2022 NBA Edition SmALL-STARS feature the new magnetic Wilson Official NBA Ball. The figure can be displayed with or without ball in hand!  Each limited edition unit is officially licensed by the NBA and individually numbered for collectors and fans alike! Be sure to add LeBron to your collection today!
nodes.name: LeBron James SmALL-STARS

nodes.description: Uniquely stylized collectible art, the Kevin Durant 2022 Brooklyn Nets NBA Edition figure is a blend of urban street art and anime-influenced vinyl collectibles.  Only 500 figures were produced with the highest level of craftsmanship and attention to detail. The oversized, approximately 12-inch Kevin is an attractive, highly collectible, lifestyle product sure to make an immediate impression whether displayed in the home or at the office.  The 2022 NBA Edition SmALL-STARS feature the new magnetic Wilson Official NBA Ball. The figure can be displayed with or without ball in hand!  Each limited edition unit is officially licensed by the NBA and individually numbered for collectors and fans alike! Be sure to add Kevin to your collection today!
nodes.name: Kevin Durant SmALL-STARS

nodes.description: Kidrobot has teamed up with artist Quiccs to bring to life the fusion of TEQ and Dunny in an epic creation.   Introducing the VOLTEQ Dunny 20 Vinyl Art Figure by Philippines-based illustrator, toy designer, and graffiti artist Quiccs. This giant 20 Dunny is a mecha-inspired statement piece based on the artist's TEQ63 character, a post-apocalyptic hero living in a dystopian society.  Quiccs is inspired by a love of Japanese robot culture and hip-hop, and has a vibrant street-art style that is instantly recognizable.   Don't miss your chance to own the VOLTEQ Dunny!
nodes.name: VOLTEQ Dunny

nodes.description: The XL-15 Spaceship, as piloted by Buzz Lightyear in the Pixar film Lightyear, joins the Chogokin series! Featuring fine detail and diecast metal parts, this faithful portrayal puts you right in the action.
nodes.name: XL-15 Space Ship

nodes.description: To commemorate the 20th Anniversary of Kingdom Hearts, a new version of King Mickey joins our Series Plush line.  This new version of Mickey showcased in his Kingdom Hearts II outfit and features the 20th anniversary logo embroidered on the sole of his foot. Mickey also comes with his trunk case as seen in the game! This will be a great addition to any fan's KINGDOM HEARTS collection!
nodes.name: King Mickey (20th Anniversary Version)

nodes.description: To infinity and beyond! Buzz Lightyear, as seen in his 'Alpha Suit' from the Pixar movie Lightyear, joins S.H. Figuarts! Numerous options and accessories let you re-create your favorite scenes from the film.
nodes.name: Buzz Lightyear Alpha Suit

nodes.description: Janky's SECOND EVER Fashion Accident has arrived and he's got his EYEZ on tha PRIZE. Fashion Accident Def Notez is 8' of GLOWING vinyl with enough dilated peepers to see every version of the future (SPOILER ALERT: they all end in getting MESSED UP)  With an emotional support paddle for swatting away FEELINGS and designer DEADphones for keeping the world on MUTE, this lil' accident is anything butt a mistake.
nodes.name: Fashion Accident "Def Notez" SuperJanky

nodes.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics, in partnership with Nickelodeon, are proud to announce Zuko from the high-end figure line based on the hit series Avatar: The Last Airbender.   This deluxe hand-painted plastic figure features his ability to manipulate his elemental, known as bending. The base also features the symbol of his respective bending style.  Firebending master and prince of Fire Nation, Zuko, was originally the bitter enemy of the Avatar and his friends. After much internal struggle and turmoil, he comes to reject his father's ideal of conquering the nations of the world. Now a lifelong friend and mentor to the Avatar, he strives to end the war and restore the honor of the Fire Nation.  Anime fans don't miss your chance to add this Zuko figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Zuko

nodes.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics, in partnership with Nickelodeon, are proud to announce Katara from the high-end figure line based on the hit series Avatar: The Last Airbender.   This deluxe hand-painted plastic figure features her ability to manipulate her elemental, known as bending. The base also features the symbol of her respective bending style.  The water bending master, Katara, is letting her hair down and is ready to show the fire nation that she means business. Although she is an extremely warm and compassionate person, this figure exhibits Katara's fierce resolve and willingness to do whatever it takes to protect those she cares about.  Anime fans don't miss your chance to add this Katara figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Katara

nodes.description: Sideshow presents the Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition, a special edition licensed BTS collectible inspired by the hit song DNA from the album LOVE YOURSELF 承 'Her.'  Measuring 7 tall and 4.5 wide, the Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition takes the iconic shape of the 21st-century pop icons' logo, visualized as a set of doors opening outward to possibility, and incorporates lyrics and vibrant doodles in celebration of RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook's stardom.  Multicolored nebulas, planets, and hearts pop against an all black background. They converge in a universe of music and creativity, continuing this message of eternal love with hands making finger hearts as well as the iconic words, I WANT IT REAL LOVE. The song title DNA appears in colorful capital letters on both sides of the statue.   The Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition also features the ARMY symbol, right behind the BTS logo, bringing together past and present in a single elegant design.  Embrace a destiny of true love when you bring home the BTS Premium Logo: DNA Edition today!
nodes.name: Premium BTS Logo: DNA Edition

nodes.description: To celebrate 20 years since the release of the original Kingdom Hearts game comes the Anniversary Pin Box Volume 1.   This collection features 11 unique pins throughout the Kingdom Hearts franchise. This book-shaped box can double as a display piece, perfect for any fan's collection.  Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Kingdom Hearts 20th Anniversary Pin Box Vol. 1

nodes.description: To celebrate 20 years since the release of the original Kingdom Hearts game comes the Anniversary Pin Box Volume 2.   This collection features 11 unique pins throughout the Kingdom Hearts franchise. This book-shaped box can double as a display piece, perfect for any fan's collection.  Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
nodes.name: Kingdom Hearts 20th Anniversary Pin Box Vol. 2

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Castle Defence Fine Art Print, a high fantasy art print of mythic proportions by artist Greg Rutkowski.  Perhaps best recognized for his breathtaking contributions to fan-favorite fantasy gaming titles, Greg Rutkowski's prolific career includes a saga of original adventures as well. In Castle Defence, legions of knights mount an armored assault on an invading dragon. The stone keep crumbles beneath the beast's mighty wings as smoke from its flame attacks rises into the sky. Bodies of the slain surround the battlefield, showing the scale of the horrible struggle to protect the stronghold.  Each Castle Defence Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available unframed and in a custom framed format, this incredible dragon wall art will be a treasured addition to any collector's fantasy display.  For the good of the realm, bring home the Castle Defence Fine Art Print by Greg Rutkowski today!
nodes.name: Castle Defence

nodes.description: To eradicate us fully, you'd need to rip apart the foundation of the city. You would need to tear Gotham to the ground.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Batman™: The Court of Owls Fine Art Print, an original DC Comics art print by acclaimed illustrator Alex Garner that undermines the very framework of Gotham City as Bruce Wayne knows it.  Inspired by the acclaimed comic book storyline, this exciting illustration drops the Dark Knight into a clandestine cabal meeting for the fate of his beloved city. Since Gotham was founded, the Court of Owls has pulled the strings, wielding their wealth for political influence and power. Here, Batman comes face to masked face with the anonymous crowds, who raise a toast to the surprise spectacle. A pair of Talons, lethal Court assassins, confront the Caped Crusader, while other elite members of the organization casually observe the battle that was over before it even began.  Each Batman: The Court of Owls Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 375 pieces. DC Comics fans can prove their loyalty to the unstoppable secret society with this can't-miss piece of Batman artwork for their home collections.  Bring the darkness home to roost! Add the Batman: The Court of Owls Fine Art Print to your DC Comics collection today.
nodes.name: Batman™: The Court of Owls

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest Canvas Art Print, a breathtaking fantasy illustration by artist Greg Rutkowski that will take your collection to the peaks of imagination.  On a journey through the winding mountains, a pair of intrepid adventurers encounter the secret summit lair of a gargantuan eagle. The beastly bird is ready to defend its home with its talons outstretched while the mage prepares a protective spell for the oncoming fight. At such a dizzying elevation above the frost and clouds, one false move could send the heroes plummeting to their deaths. Would you dare to face the fury of this mighty roc?  Each Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this fantasy wall art makes an epic addition to any fantasy collector's home gallery. Be sure to browse the entire Greg Rutkowski collection from Sideshow for even more dragons, wizards, and epic fantasy scenes you can add to your wall.  Soar to new heights when you bring home the Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest Fine Art Print by Greg Rutkowski today!
nodes.name: Secret Pass: Eagle's Nest

A joint collaboration between MANAS S+U+M and sculptor Akishi Ueda and Pony on Wheel Studio, the Junior Beast - Leo Collectible figures is a striking and beautifully surreal limited-edition collector's item that would be a great addition, or a great start, to any art collection.

nodes.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Dragon Cave 2 Fine Art Print, an original piece of fantasy artwork from the mind of artist Greg Rutkowski.  Fire, desolation, and danger await adventurers brave and foolish enough to step into the lair of a full-grown black dragon. Prolific fantasy artist Greg Rutkowski puts viewers face to face with an enraged beast, its massive taloned wings digging into the earth of its cave domain. Fire burns in the background, trapping the treasure hunters in close range as it opens its jaws to strike.  Each Dragon Cave 2 Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this dragon wall art makes a ferocious addition to any fantasy collector's home gallery or gaming room.  Tip the scales in your favor and bring home the Dragon Cave 2 Fine Art Print by Greg Rutkowski for your hoard of treasures today.
nodes.name: Dragon Cave 2

nodes.description: The iconic moment when Six uses her lighter to illuminate the darkness of the vessel is faithfully recreated.  A stark contrast of light and dark was used with the paint to highlight the way the light hits Six and emphasizes the creepy intense air of the game. Her face, which is hardly seen during gameplay, is thoroughly sculpted in tight detail. In spite of this mini size, the sculpture captures all the wrinkles and stitches on her characteristic yellow raincoat, creating a realistic piece.  The candle which acts as the save point in the game along with books that are sometimes used as step ladders are captured on the base. Both are essential items for Six.  'Little Nightmares' is a horror adventure game starring Six a little girl who's trying to escape the massive vessel Maw, using her courage and wisdom. The heroine Six, and the strange and horrible residents by her side are recreated as palm-sized mini figures. Symbolic props for each character adorn the detailed diorama bases, capturing the wonderful and weird atmosphere of the game.  Be Sure to add this figure to your collection today!
nodes.name: Six

nodes.description: Sideshow and Star Ace Toys are excited to present the Minaton Statue!  The servant of an evil sorceress, the Minaton is a great bronze automaton that exists only to serve the will of its master. Powered by a clockwork heart, this large metal Minotaur has the strength of many men and towers over normal humans.   Created by stop-motion genius Ray Harryhausen, this detailed replica of the animation puppet is 20 tall and carries his huge spear held in his right hand.  Traditionally sculpted by the artisans of the famed creature shop of Kaibutsuya, this detailed Minaton statue is made from polyresin and stands 20' tall. Each piece is hand-painted to look like it has a Bronze finish.   Don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Minaton (Normal Version)
